The '''Tyyyn Nebula''' was a vast cloud in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]]. The gas and dust were unusually thick and dense throughout, making the nebula a natural choice for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]],<ref name="SWG:TTN" /> such as the [[Ghrag Mercenaries]],<ref name="web" /> preying on unsuspecting [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. All throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Tyyyn Nebula remained a hotbed of piracy.<ref name="SWG:TTN" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Ghrag Mercenaries attacked the civilian [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|medium transports]] ''[[Tereant III]]'' and ''[[Vue'zae]]'' in the Tyyyn Nebula. The vessels were finally rescued by the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Civilian Protection Guild]].<ref name="SWG:RadCTitTn">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=space|Rescue a damaged Civilian Transport in the Tyyyn nebula|Kashyyyk system}}</ref><ref name="SWG:TGSA">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=space|The Ghrag Strike Again!|Kashyyyk system}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Tyyyn Nebula appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TTN" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
